message:
[LOW] fcp-async-core-macros: fix two non-compiling internal unit tests

- Derive Debug on Flavor so expect_err works in parse_flavor_rejects_duplicate_argument.
- Reverse keyword order in validate_signature_rejects_unsafe (async must precede unsafe per Rust grammar); syn failed with "expected fn" before the assertion was ever reached.

Both tests previously never ran successfully. Proc-macro logic itself audits clean: hygiene via absolute ::fcp_async_core paths, strict validation of sig shape, no #[pin_project] misuse, no token-tree escape hatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
